approvalNotes: Approved unattended Foundation continuation after ENGINE-001.
Implement temporal truth for strategy and decisions using validFrom, validUntil, supersededBy, and computed currentState query rules.
Do not build Graphiti, broad memory import, external writes, provider calls, private data upload, or automatic decision lock/apply in this card.
Close only with focused proof, System Health, repeated-failure gate, backlog hygiene, foundation:verify, and process:foundation-ship.
